description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ruby:2.3 Docker image. Define a deploy stage with a pages job that runs bundle install --without tests --path vendor then bundle exec rake docs, publishes the public/ directory as a Pages artifact, and runs in the deploy stage. Add a test stage with two jobs: test:puppet48 and test:puppetlatest, both using the shared test template script that runs bundle install --jobs $(nproc) --without docs --path vendor and bundle exec rake test; the test:puppet48 job also sets FACTER_VERSION, HIERA_VERSION, and PUPPET_VERSION variables. No additional services, caches, or rules are required.
